timeline.label: Peak newspaper employment
timeline.detail: ~375K total newspaper jobs across the U.S.

timeline.label: Financial crisis accelerates closures
timeline.detail: Ad revenue collapses. Hundreds of papers fold or merge.

timeline.label: iPad launches, digital transition begins
timeline.detail: Digital subscriptions start but never replace print revenue.

timeline.label: Half of newspaper jobs gone
timeline.detail: Employment drops below 200K. "Digital-first" becomes survival mode.

timeline.label: COVID devastates remaining outlets
timeline.detail: Local papers lose last-resort revenue: event ads, classifieds.

timeline.label: ChatGPT launches
timeline.detail: A new era begins. Generative AI enters the newsroom.

timeline.label: 87K newspaper jobs remain
timeline.detail: Down 77% from peak. The collapse happened before AI.
